name: Sylvanas
description: An Assassin who can possess enemy minions
title: The Banshee Queen
info: Sylvanas Windrunner was not always the Dark Lady of the Forsaken. In another life, she was the Ranger-General of Silvermoon. But that was before the Death Knight Arthas slew her and her people and raised her as the first Banshee.

Sylvanas.name: Withering Fire
Sylvanas.description: Shoot the closest enemy up to 5 times over 1.5 seconds for 39 (+4% per level) damage, prioritizing Heroes. Cooldown is reset on getting a Takedown.

Sylvanas.name: Shadow Dagger
Sylvanas.description: Throw a dagger at a target enemy that deals 30 (+4% per level) damage and an additional 150 (+4% per level) damage over 2.5 seconds. Damage dealt by Sylvanas to the initial target spreads Shadow Dagger to all nearby enemies.

Sylvanas.name: Haunting Wave
Sylvanas.description: Send forth a wave of banshees dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage to all targets. Reactivate to teleport to the banshees' location.

Sylvanas.name: Wailing Arrow
Sylvanas.description: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 (+4% per level) damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.

Sylvanas.name: Mind Control
Sylvanas.description: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.

Sylvanas.name: Black Arrows
Sylvanas.description: Basic Attacks infect enemies with Black Arrows for 3 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. Sylvanas deals 15% more damage to enemies with 3 stacks.  Quest: Damage Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.  Reward: Upon damaging enemies 250 times, increase the damage bonus provided by Black Arrows to 50%.  Mythic Reward: Upon damaging enemies 400 times, Black Arrows now heals Sylvanas for 25% of damage dealt at 3 stacks, doubled against Heroes.

Sylvanas.name: Possession
Sylvanas.description: Activate to force an enemy Minion to fight for Sylvanas's team. Catapults require 3 charges. Stores up to 4 charges.

1.name: Might of the Banshee Queen
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Withering Fire increases Sylvanas's Attack Speed and Spell Power by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

1.name: Unrelenting Torment
1.description: Increase the damage of Shadow Dagger by 20% and increase its duration by 1 second.

1.name: Overwhelming Affliction
1.description: Enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows are Slowed by 15%. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against Slowed enemy Heroes deal 1% of their maximum Health as damage.

4.name: Unstable Poison
4.description: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.

4.name: Mercenary Queen
4.description: Friendly non-Elite Mercenaries near Sylvanas deal 60% more damage.  Sylvanas's Basic Attacks Stun and instantly apply 3 stacks of Black Arrows to neutral Mercenaries.  Sylvanas deals 30% additional damage to Mercenaries with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.

4.name: Haunting Arrows
4.description: Black Arrows can now be activated to cause all Basic Attacks and Abilities to Stun Minions and Structures for 3 seconds. Lasts for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks against Structures reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.

7.name: Barbed Shot
7.description: Hitting the same enemy with 5 shots of Withering Fire causes the 5th shot to deal 400% bonus damage.

7.name: Lost Soul
7.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows reduce the cooldown of Shadow Dagger by 0.75 seconds, doubled against Heroes.

7.name: Festering Wounds
7.description: Increase Haunting Wave's damage by 15%. Haunting Wave applies 3 stacks of Black Arrows.

10.name: Wailing Arrow
10.description: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 (+4% per level) damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.

10.name: Mind Control
10.description: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.

13.name: Cold Embrace
13.description: Shadow Dagger reduces the Armor of the initial target by 25 and any enemy it spreads to by 10 for 2.5 seconds.

13.name: Windrunner
13.description: Haunting Wave can be cast a second time for free within 4 seconds after teleporting. Teleporting with Haunting Wave resets the cooldown of Withering Fire.

13.name: Remorseless
13.description: Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows shoot an untalented shot of Withering Fire. This shot of Withering Fire applies Black Arrows.  Increase Sylvanas's Basic Attack range by 1.

16.name: Evasive Fire
16.description: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.

16.name: Life Drain
16.description: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sylvanas to enemies with 3 stacks of Black Arrows. Healing is doubled against Heroes.

16.name: Will of the Forsaken
16.description: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

20.name: Deafening Blast
20.description: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take 50% more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.

20.name: Dark Lady's Call
20.description: Heroes hit by Mind Control have their vision radius greatly reduced for 5 seconds. Mind Control's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.

20.name: Withering Barrage
20.description: Withering Fire applies Black Arrows, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.

20.name: Bolt of the Storm
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

tooltipMarkup.GenericBoltoftheStormTalent: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

Healing is doubled against Heroes.

tooltipMarkup.SylvanasBlackArrowsUnstablePoisonTalent: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,SylvanasBlackArrowUnstablePoisonTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.

Sylvanas deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,SylvanasShadowDaggerDoTDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MercenaryQueenBonusDamage].Modifier"/>%</c> additional damage to Mercenaries with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SylvanasBlackArrowsStackingBehavior,MaxStackCount"/></c> stacks of Black Arrows.

Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,SylvanasMindControlSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>, have <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,SylvanasMindControlApply3StacksOfBlackArrowsApplyBehavior,Count"/></c> stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SylvanasMindControlMissileSilence,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.

tooltipMarkup.SylvanasWailingArrowDeafeningBlastTalent: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.

tooltipMarkup.SylvanasWitheringFireEvasiveFireTalent: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,SylvanasWitheringFireEvasiveFireSpeedup,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SylvanasWitheringFireEvasiveFireSpeedup,Duration" player="0"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,SylvanasWitheringFireEvasiveFireSpeedup,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*Behavior,SylvanasWitheringFireEvasiveFireSpeedup,MaxStackCount" precision="2"/>%</c>. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.
tooltipMarkup.SylvanasWitheringFireWitheringBarrage: Withering Fire applies Black Arrows, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,SylvanasWitheringFireWitheringBarrageModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
